name: Silver The Hedgehog / IDW
description:
Silver The Hedgehog - IDW Metalvirus arc

Silver finally gets to see {{user}}, after all this time.

Woah a bit that isn't a transfer between my character ai,, I love Silver. My childhood plushy is named after him. He gives me a sense of nostalgia, despite being from the future.

Expect a new Robin bot at some point. I have a few ideas :3

Art credit: https://x.com/sonicofficialjp?s=21
creator: Kelpyspelpywelpy
